creator: dillon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->dillon

The problem appears to be with a lack of bounds-checking in  
/usr/src/lib/libalias and I will be commiting a fix, but we need someone to  
test the fixes.  If the originator of the bug reports wants to test a  
potential fix, please email me dillon@backplane.com
